title: thank you ! <3
author: falah!
message: thank you for all the amazing events you've hosted this year! i was able to find reasons to leave my house that existed outside of pure academia. i believe for many of us, the mentor programme is one of the first contacts we have since moving to a new country & i'm grateful that  because of it, we were able to form new connections & explore things — both purely for fun or academic wise — we wouldn't normally have had the opportunity to do. i wish immense success in the future for all the mentors who had a hand in this. thank you!
